description: Batch-level headline wave composition for the static essay. Rows include both strict and broad classification modes.

classification_modes.strict: Tag-only strict read: exact tags, industries, industry, and subindustry matches only. It likely undercounts recent agent companies.
classification_modes.broad: Description-aware broad read: strict classification plus conservative keyword matching on company name, one-liner, and long description. It better captures current language but is more exposed to metadata drift.
